{{Quote|Nothing like a peaceful day in Narmle. This is the perfect place to have retired to...ah, who am I kidding. I miss Corellia.|[[Horace Korr]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:V" />}}
'''Narmle''' was the first of two settlements built on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] moon of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. Named for [[King/Legends|King]] [[Narmlé]] of Naboo, Narmle was the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of Rori.

==Description==
Narmle was nestled in the [[Narmle Swamp]] in the southwestern portion of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. The expansive [[Narmle Bog]] bordered the city to the south and east.<ref name="SWG:N" /> The city was built by [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] architects in a [[Classical Naboo style/Legends|classical Naboo style]].<ref name="SWG:R" />

In general, the residents of Narmle were a very open and welcoming people, both kind to strangers and hospitable to all visitors. Tourists were often directed to the fabled "Talking Bantha," a large and [[Hair/Legends|hairy]] [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] that apparently spoke with great insight and wisdom. Although scholars insisted that the Talking Bantha was a simple hoax, the verbose creature continued to attract curiosity seekers from across the galaxy.<ref name="SWG:N" />

[[File:Narmle.png|thumb|left|250px|A park in Narmle.]]
Although technically under the control of Naboo's [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Monarch of Naboo]], Narmle was largely self-governed by a handful of elected officials. The Governor of Rori, who was charged with ruling the entire population of the moon, had his home and offices in Narmle<ref name="SWG:N" /> and was part of the [[Naboo Royal Advisory Council/Legends|Naboo Royal Advisory Council]].<ref name="SWG:R" /> The city of Narmle maintained its own [[Narmle Militia|militia]].<ref name="SWG" />

Narmle hosted the annual [[Narmle Memorial Rally]], which attracted a large number of thrill-seekers from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="SWG:NMR" />

==History==
Narmle was the first settlement built on the moon Rori during the colonization of the moon around [[2032 BBY]]. The city was founded by [[King/Legends|King]] [[Narmlé]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] who planned its construction during the colonization of Rori.<ref name="SWG:R" /> The city's founders selected its location because they believed the Narmle Bog would protect the settlement from any dangerous native inhabitants, while the lands to the north and west promised an abundance of natural resources. Unfortunately, life in Narmle proved much more difficult than any of the Naboo colonists expected, and the city never became the hub of agriculture that its original founders envisioned.<ref name="SWG:N" />

Narmle would have withered away if not for the onset of a devastating [[Brainrot Plague|Brainworm Rot Plague]] nearly two hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. Narmle's inhabitants were commissioned to build a second settlement, [[Restuss]], to quarantine infected colonists traveling to Naboo. The influx of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and new labor helped Narmle expand into a small, thriving city. Medical research conducted in Narmle eventually helped cure the plague, and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] officials rewarded the city for its efforts, by funding the construction of a [[Center for Arts and Education]]. Although the city remained small compared to other capital cities such as [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] or [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]], it was far more remarkable than during its early days as a simple supply outpost for hard-working farmers.<ref name="SWG:N" />

Narmle maintained a friendly rivalry with its sister city of Restuss. As the only cities on Rori, Narmle and Restuss typically competed for funds, visitors, and settlers from Naboo. Narmle's inhabitants often exhibited a sense of superiority, stemming from the fact that Narmle natives actually built Restuss. The rivalry had become heated on occasion, although it had only rarely erupted into violence.<ref name="SWG:N" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Narmle, like Rori itself, went relatively unnoticed by most of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the moon was ruled by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Ferrox]] who represented the [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of Naboo [[Kylantha]].<ref name="SWG:N" />

==Inhabitants==
The following individuals were residents or visitors of the city in the time after the Battle of Yavin: [[Oxil Sarban]], [[Geg Winthazen]], [[Dender]], [[Seldair Keeloo]], [[Biribas Tarun]], [[Goru Rainstealer]], [[Jaleela Bindoo]], [[Sidoras Bey]], [[Sindra Lintikoor]], [[Zeelius Kraymunder]],<ref name="SWG" /> [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], [[Kole]],<ref name="SWG:RotW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref> [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Edvar Vang]], [[Kaila Min]],<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref> [[Wolff Kalos]],<ref name="SWG:TTE">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref> [[Ria (smuggler)|Ria]],<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref> [[Wernell Covington]], [[Horace Korr]], and [[Orden Tarc]].<ref name="SWG:TCOA">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>
